headline: Jeremy Doku
body: 🚨🔵 BREAKING: Manchester City agree on new deal for Jeremy Doku. Verbal agreement in place with details to be finalised soon, five year deal and salary increased for Belgian winger. Doku, set to sign soon — same as Josko Gvardiol. https://t.
text:
🚨🔵 BREAKING: Manchester City agree on new deal for Jeremy Doku.

Verbal agreement in place with details to be finalised soon, five year deal and salary increased for Belgian winger.

Doku, set to sign soon — same as Josko Gvardiol. https://t.co/4fCGA0SJbV
